description: Pins the single GET for a valid tier. Tier validation text/behavior diverges (Go accepts only standard|enterprise with 'tier is required'/'tier must be ...'; Python uses a regex path-segment check with 'tier must be a non-empty path segment'), so rejection cases are reported, not pinned.

cases.name: rejects an invalid tier (proto LKETier enum)
cases.expect_error: tier must be one of: standard, enterprise
